properties.description: Production screenshot of the Sanad (سند) legal app dashboard. RTL Arabic UI for a Saudi legal practice management platform. Shows a logged-in lawyer (Ahmed) on Sunday June 21 2026.

Main daily operations dashboard. Greets the lawyer by name, shows date in both Gregorian and Hijri calendars, displays urgent cases, compliance deadlines, overdue tasks, focus/billing timers, today's priorities, a news digest, and upcoming compliance expirations.

Right-side navigation panel with items: لوحة التحكم (Dashboard), العملاء (Clients), لوحة القضايا (Cases Board), الاتصالات (Communications), المستندات (Documents), الفواتير (Invoices), الامتثال (Compliance, badge=4), المهام (Tasks, badge=9), العمل العميق (Deep Work), التقويم (Calendar).

Three top-level KPI cards: Urgent Cases (قضايا عاجلة=1, requires action today), Expiring Soon (تنتهي قريباً=4, compliance items >30 days), Overdue Tasks (مهام متأخرة=2, needs immediate attention). Color-coded: red for urgent, yellow/orange for expiring, pink for overdue.

Two timer widgets on the dashboard: ساعات التركيز اليوم (Focus hours today) and ساعات القوترة اليوم (Billing hours today) with SAR currency indicator, both showing 0:00 in the screenshot. Implies time-tracking and billable hour capture features.

Widget listing today's priority tasks with urgency indicators. Items shown: follow up on confidentiality agreement signing (high priority, 2 days overdue, idle status), and two urgent client update tasks regarding Gulf Pharmacies case. Color-coded red dots for urgency.

Left panel showing Saudi regulatory news relevant to lawyers. Sources shown: وزارة العدل (Ministry of Justice) announcing e-litigation portal V3, وزارة الموارد البشرية (Ministry of Human Resources) updating remote work policy, هيئة الزكاة (Zakat Authority) reminding about Q2 VAT filing. Each item tagged with source and date.

nodes.label: Upcoming Compliance Expiry Widget (الامتثال الذي ينتهي قريباً)

properties.description: Widget listing compliance deadlines expiring soon with day countdown and progress bars. Items: Social insurance subscription (6 days, red), Commercial registry (7 days, orange), Iqama renewal (17 days, yellow), VAT Q2 (27 days, green). Progress bars visually encode urgency.

Top navigation bar toggle allowing the user to switch between محامي (Lawyer) and طالب (Student) roles. Current active role is محامي. Implies dual-mode app serving both practicing lawyers and law students.

Footer shows 'محتون بالخادم المحلي : PWA مُفعَّل' (Cached from local server: PWA enabled) and 'سند — لوحة العمليات اليومية للمحامين والمنشآت الصغيرة في السعودية' (Sanad — Daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia). Confirms PWA offline capability using local server caching.
properties.tagline: Daily operations dashboard for lawyers and small businesses in Saudi Arabia

properties.description: Visual design patterns observed: RTL card-based layout, green/teal brand color for Sanad logo, red/orange/yellow urgency color scale, Arabic typography, Hijri+Gregorian dual dates, badge counters on nav items, circular avatar with initials, clean whitespace with subtle card borders.
